intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered rear, mid-band hall, great_room smoke test, no carport. 11x9 lot gives a 7x5 envelope = 35 m2 floor -- the shallow-depth minimum this topology now serves as the compact-lot sibling of 1s_2br_wd_side_split_baths_cl_ld (which needs >=5.5 m buildable depth for its living/dining/kitchen split and can't reach this size). Master ensuite + common bath share wet-stack plumbing walls at the rear along with kitchen; a hallway is tucked into the mid sub-column between standard (front) and common (rear) -- all bedroom and bath doors open onto the hall, never directly onto the public side. Public side is one combined great_room + kitchen (2-deep stack), not a separate living/dining split.
must_haves: common bath accessible from the hall
clustered baths at the rear sharing plumbing with the kitchen
mid-band hallway serving both bedrooms and the common bath
